title: Farms or manufactories recognized as public works
doc_html:
§463.  Farms or manufactories recognized as public works

If parish governing authorities shall establish any farms or manufactories, or embark in any farming or manufacturing enterprises, to carry out the object of this Part, they shall be regarded and recognized as public works within the meaning of the law.
doc_text:
§463.  Farms or manufactories recognized as public works
If parish governing authorities shall establish any farms or manufactories, or embark in any farming or manufacturing enterprises, to carry out the object of this Part, they shall be regarded and recognized as public works within the meaning of the law.
